name: depsurface
purpose: Extract the public API of a package actually installed in the project, version-stamped and cached.
reach_for_me_when: you are about to call a third-party library API from memory
you need the exact signature a dependency exposes in this project's installed version
you need to see what changed in a dependency's API between two versions

commands.name: diff
commands.summary: Diff two stored snapshots of a package
